title: Stablecoins will be crypto’s ‘ChatGPT moment’ for businesses: Ripple
message_html: Stablecoins will be crypto’s ‘ChatGPT moment’ for businesses: Ripple ...
snippet: Ripple’s Brad Garlinghouse noted that stablecoin trading volume soared to over $33 trillion in 2025, while Bloomberg predicted that stablecoin flows would hit $56.6 trillion by 2030.
